name: Triple Whale Ecommerce Analytics API
what_it_does: Triple Whale ecommerce analytics REST API for DTC brands and Shopify merchants to centralize ad spend, revenue, contribution margin, and customer lifetime value data with pixel-based multi-touch attribution, post-purchase surveys, and Moby AI assistant for ecommerce intelligence automation. Enables AI agents to manage dashboard metric retrieval for DTC analytics automation, handle attribution data access for multi-touch customer journey automation, access ad spend efficiency metrics for ROAS and MER reporting automation, retrieve customer lifetime value and cohort analysis for retention analytics automation, manage post-purchase survey response collection for zero-party data automation, handle blended ROAS and contribution margin reporting for ecommerce profitability automation, access Shopify revenue and order data integration for DTC financial automation, retrieve creative analytics for ad creative performance automation, manage product analytics for inventory and margin automation, and integrate Triple Whale with Shopify, Meta Ads, Google Ads, TikTok Ads, and Klaviyo for end-to-end DTC analytics automation.
use_cases: Retrieving blended ROAS and MER from DTC media efficiency agents
Accessing multi-touch attribution data from customer journey analytics agents
Collecting post-purchase survey data from zero-party data agents
Monitoring contribution margin from DTC profitability intelligence agents
not_for: Enterprise marketing analytics at scale (use Supermetrics or Funnel.io for enterprise data pipelines)
B2B SaaS analytics (Triple Whale is DTC/ecommerce specific)
Customer data platform and activation (use Klaviyo or Segment for CRM activation)
best_when: A DTC brand or Shopify merchant wanting AI agents to automate ecommerce analytics, multi-touch attribution, blended ROAS reporting, and post-purchase survey insights through Triple Whale's DTC-native intelligence platform.
avoid_when: SHOPIFY-CENTRIC PLATFORM: Triple Whale is optimized for Shopify merchants; non-Shopify ecommerce platforms have limited integration depth; automated analytics for WooCommerce or Magento stores creates reduced functionality compared to Shopify-native integrations. ATTRIBUTION MODEL REQUIRES PIXEL INSTALLATION: Triple Whale attribution requires JavaScript pixel on storefront and post-purchase page; automated attribution data depends on pixel correctly installed; automated pixel-less attribution produces click-based only data without view-through or cross-device tracking. API ACCESS TIER REQUIREMENTS: Triple Whale API access requires Growth plan or higher; automated API integration for Starter plan merchants creates unauthorized API access error; automated API access must verify plan includes API feature. MOBY AI QUERY RATE LIMITS: Triple Whale Moby AI (natural language analytics) has query rate limits; automated high-frequency Moby queries create rate limit exceeded errors; automated analytics should use structured API endpoints instead of Moby for high-frequency data access.

auth.notes: Triple Whale uses API key and OAuth 2.0 for API authentication. REST API with JSON. Columbus, Ohio HQ. Founded 2021 by Maxx Blank, AJ Orbach, Ivan Chernykh, and Jonathan Pogact. Backed by Tiger Global, Left Lane, Upper90 ($27M raised). Products: Analytics dashboard, pixel attribution, post-purchase surveys, Moby AI, creative analytics, product analytics. GDPR. SOC2. Serves 10,000+ Shopify DTC brands. Competes with Northbeam and Rockerbox for DTC attribution.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — requires Growth plan for API access
pricing.paid_tiers: Starter ($129/mo), Growth ($299/mo), Enterprise (custom); based on monthly orders
pricing.notes: Columbus OH. Tiger Global backed. Per-month/orders subscription. API requires Growth plan minimum.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; analytics and attribution queries throttled; webhooks for order and data sync events

known_agent_gotchas: DATE RANGE ATTRIBUTION WINDOW ALIGNMENT: Triple Whale attribution data uses configurable attribution windows (1-day, 7-day, 28-day click); automated ROAS reporting must specify consistent attribution window; automated comparison of ROAS across different attribution windows creates misleading performance data

SHOP-LEVEL API SCOPE: Triple Whale API access is scoped to individual Shopify shop; automated multi-shop agency reporting must make separate API calls per shop; automated cross-shop data aggregation requires per-shop authentication and separate API calls

POST-PURCHASE SURVEY DATA LAG: Triple Whale post-purchase survey responses accumulate after order; automated survey analytics must account for response collection period; automated immediate post-purchase survey analysis creates low response count for recent orders

BLENDED METRICS REQUIRE AD PLATFORM CONNECTIONS: Triple Whale blended ROAS requires connected Meta, Google, and TikTok ad accounts; automated blended metric access depends on all ad platform OAuth connections active; automated blended ROAS with missing ad platform connection creates partial data with undefined channels excluded

CREATIVE ANALYTICS REQUIRES ASSET TAGGING: Triple Whale creative analytics requires UTM or asset-level tracking; automated creative performance analysis depends on consistent UTM naming convention; automated creative analytics with inconsistent UTM creates unknown creative attribution
agent_readiness.security_notes: DTC analytics. GDPR, SOC2. API key/OAuth. US. Ecommerce and ad attribution data.

security_score_components.security_notes: DTC analytics. GDPR, SOC2. API key/OAuth. US. Ecommerce performance data.
